expectations.text: Housing is identified as the largest expense category ($2,200)
expectations.evidence: Table shows Housing ranked #1 at $2,200.00, described as 'largest by far (65.9% of total)'

expectations.text: Spending is broken down by account (Chase Checking vs Amex Gold)
expectations.evidence: Account Breakdown table shows Chase Checking $3,086.60 (11 txns) and Amex Gold $251.45 (6 txns) with percentage split

expectations.text: At least one transaction is flagged as notable or unusual
expectations.evidence: Rent Payment ($2,200.00) flagged as 'Statistical outlier - 11.2x the average expense of $196.36'

expectations.text: Categories are ranked or sorted by total spend amount
expectations.evidence: Categories listed in descending order from Housing ($2,200) to Entertainment ($28.97) with rank numbers

expectations.text: Missing values or data quality issues are mentioned (even if none found)
expectations.evidence: Data Quality section states 'No missing values detected across all 5 columns' and 'No duplicate entries found'
